authority_scope.scope: synthetic allocation packets with indivisible requests, reserved capacity, and auditable residuals

propositions.statement: Remove ineligible requests before ranking and record one explicit exclusion reason for each removed request.
Allocate eligible indivisible requests in descending priority, breaking equal priority by earlier submitted sequence and then lexical request identifier.
A request is funded only when its full quantity fits both the remaining total capacity and every applicable reserved-pool constraint; partial funding is forbidden.
Close the allocation ledger by reconciling opening capacity, funded quantities by pool, protected residuals, and unassigned residual to the exact total.

contradictions.resolution: Rank order selects the next request to test but cannot override indivisibility or reserved-pool feasibility.

failure_signatures.signature: ineligible request remains in the ranked funding sequence
equal-priority requests are resolved without the declared deterministic tie-break
a request is partially funded or consumes protected capacity
ledger residuals do not reconcile exactly to opening capacity

leakage_signatures: breaking equal priority by earlier submitted sequence and then lexical request identifier
claim_boundary: Builder-authored synthetic procedure for contract calibration only; no expert provenance or professional validity.
